Terms of Use

By accessing SingaporeCommodities.com, you agree to the following terms.

Nature of the Platform

This platform is: - Informational - Analytical - Structural in nature

It does not provide: - Financial advice - Investment recommendations - Real-time trading signals

All content is presented for strategic understanding and knowledge purposes.

Use of Content

You may: - Read, reference, and cite content - Use insights for research or analysis

You may not: - Republish content in bulk without attribution - Misrepresent the platform as advisory or financial authority - Use content for misleading or deceptive purposes

Accuracy and Scope

We aim for high structural accuracy, but: - Markets evolve - Systems shift - Interpretations change

The platform does not guarantee absolute completeness or real-time accuracy.

Liability

SingaporeCommodities.com is not liable for: - Decisions made based on content - Market actions taken by users - Misinterpretation of analytical frameworks

Intellectual Position

This platform represents a structured perspective, not a neutral data dump.

It interprets systems, rather than merely listing them.

Updates

Terms may evolve as the platform develops.

Continued use implies acceptance of updated terms.

Contact

agent@sohadot.com

Singapore Commodities

A sovereign-grade reference platform interpreting Singapore’s role in commodity power through maritime systems, energy transition, trade coordination, finance, logistics, and strategic intelligence.
